title: OrderRise | WhatsApp Ordering, Kitchen, Delivery & Restaurant Operations
faq_answer_texts: No. The customer-facing experience is designed around WhatsApp.
No. This public demo runs on scripted sample data only — no live restaurant system is connected. A real pilot connects to your actual WhatsApp Business number, live menu, and current stock levels.

No. This demo shows delivery status as assigned or unassigned, not live GPS location. Real-time driver tracking depends on the delivery method or driver app your restaurant uses, and can be integrated during setup.

Yes. Menu structure, modifiers, pricing rules, promotions, and kitchen ticket format are all configured specifically for your restaurant during onboarding — this demo shows one example configuration, not a fixed template.
